query:
INSERT INTO modifier_templates (name, type, required, min_selections, max_selections) VALUES 
('Choose Your Base', 'single', true, 0, 0),
('Butter & Sauces', 'multi', false, 0, 0),
('Choose Your Meat', 'multi', true, 1, 0),
('Choose Your Fillings', 'multi', false, 0, 0);
